title: Repair Cost Remover
description: Removes any repair cost when entering an inventory or being selected. 100% prevents Too Expensive in survival.
body:
Applying this onto a survival world will remove any repair cost component in two instances:
- when being selected in an inventory (i.e. being dragged by the player cursor)
- when a player's inventory updates (detects items up to 255 in repair cost)
Both of these combined will 100% prevent the "Too Expensive" message for ever potentially appearing, be that from using the anvil once or doing multiple repairs/enchanting on the anvil at once.

Currently works for 1.20.5 to 1.21.10
